heading: Procedure
body:
To set up a private endpoint for your federated database instance using the Atlas UI, follow these steps:

| Region       | Region where your endpoint is located.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| VPC ID       | Unique, 22-character alphanumeric string identifier of the peer AWS (Amazon Web Services) Virtual Private Cloud (VPC (Virtual Private Cloud)). Find this value on the VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) dashboard in your AWS (Amazon Web Services) account.                                                                 |
| Comment      | Optional comment to associate with this endpoint, such as subnet ID, VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) ID, AWS (Amazon Web Services) region, or other useful information.                                                                                                                                                    |
| DNS Hostname | Enter the alpha-numeric DNS hostname associated with your private endpoint on AWS (Amazon Web Services) in the Your VPC Endpoint DNS Name field.If you have multiple DNS names for your private endpoint, copy and paste the first name from your list. To learn more, see Manage DNS names for VPC endpoint services. |

> **Tip:** Click and expand Show more instructions in the dialog box
> for a visual clue as to where you can find the necessary
> information in the AWS (Amazon Web Services) console.

You can enter your subnet ID, VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) ID, AWS (Amazon Web Services) region, and other information to associate with this endpoint here.
